Package neqsim.process.research

package neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

The package generates candidate ProcessSystem definitions from feed, product, reaction, and unit-operation specifications, then evaluates and ranks the candidates with NeqSim's existing process simulation and optimization stack. It combines P-graph-style path enumeration, feasibility pruning, rigorous NeqSim simulation, heat-integration metrics, multi-objective scoring, robustness hooks, dominance marking, and external superstructure export for GDP/MINLP tools.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process
     
  • Class
    Description
    MaterialNode
    Material node used by process-network candidate generation.
    OperationOption
    Candidate unit operation used in process-network synthesis.
    ProcessCandidate
    Generated process candidate with simulation and ranking metadata.
    ProcessCandidateEvaluator
    Evaluates and scores generated process candidates.
    ProcessCandidateGenerator
    Generates process candidates from a ProcessResearchSpec.
    ProcessResearcher
    High-level process researcher for generating, simulating, optimizing, and ranking processes.
    ProcessResearchMetrics
    Structured metrics for a process synthesis candidate.
    ProcessResearchResult
    Result from a process research run.
    ProcessResearchSpec
    Input specification for a process research run.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    Builder for ProcessResearchSpec.
    ProcessResearchSpec.DecisionVariable
    Continuous decision variable for per-candidate optimization.
    ProcessResearchSpec.EconomicAssumptions
    Economic and emissions assumptions for synthesis ranking.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Objective
    Objective used by the default candidate ranker.
    ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget
    Product target used for candidate scoring.
    ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario
    Robustness scenario for feed-condition sensitivity checks.
    ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights
    Weights used to collapse process synthesis metrics into a ranking score.
    ProcessResearchSpec.SynthesisConstraints
    Hard acceptance constraints for generated synthesis candidates.
    ProcessSuperstructureExporter
    Exports process synthesis superstructures for external optimization tools.
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner
    Fast pre-simulation feasibility checks for process synthesis candidates.
    ProcessSynthesisFeasibilityPruner.FeasibilityResult
    Result from a feasibility check.
    ProcessSynthesisGraph
    P-graph-style material-operation graph for process synthesis.
    ProcessSynthesisTemplateLibrary
    Curated operation templates for early-stage process synthesis.
    ReactionOption
    Reaction route option for process research candidate generation.
